zh.Moulton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓
zh.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh.Egremont, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Morville於1184年出生在英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯時，她的父親Hugh de Morville46歲，母親Helawise de Stuteville43歲。她於1200年與Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於從1240年1月8日到1241年1月7日在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada de Morville于1184年出生在英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯时，她的父亲Hugh de Morville46岁，母亲Helawise de Stuteville43岁。她于1200年与Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于从1240年1月8日到1241年1月7日在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Morville was born in 1184, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, her father, Hugh de Morville, was 46 and her mother, Helawise de Stuteville, was 43. She married Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland in 1200. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died from 8 January 1240 to 7 January 1241, in her hometown, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Morville est née en 1184, à Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Morville, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Helawise de Stuteville, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland en 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée du 8 janvier 1240 au 7 janvier 1241, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada de Morville 1184 in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Morville 46 und ihre Mutter Helawise de Stuteville 43. Sie hat 1200 Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb von 8. Januar 1240 bis 7. Januar 1241 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Morville è nata il nel 1184 nel Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Hugh de Morville, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Helawise de Stuteville, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland nel 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 8 gennaio 1240 a 7 gennaio 1241, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.1240: から1240年1月8日まで1241年1月7日

ja.lifeSummary: Ada de Morvilleが1184年にイギリスクウンバーランドブルグ ビー サンズで生まれた時，父Hugh de Morvilleは46歳，母Helawise de Stutevilleは43歳であった。1200年にRichard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Couplandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1240年1月8日まで1241年1月7日に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Morville(이)가 1184년 영국 c벌랜드 버그h 비 샌드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Morville(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helawise de Stuteville(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1200년 Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 1월 8일부터 1241년 1월 7일까지 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.1240: de 8 de janeiro de 1240 a 7 de janeiro de 1241
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Morville nasceu em 1184, em Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Morville, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Helawise de Stuteville, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland em 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu de 8 de janeiro de 1240 a 7 de janeiro de 1241, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Morville родилась в 1184 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Morville было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Helawise de Stuteville, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland в 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла с 8 января 1240 по 7 января 1241 в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

sm.1240: mai le 8 Ianuari 1240 e o'o I le 7 Ianuari 1241

es.1240: desde 8 de enero de 1240 hasta 7 de enero de 1241
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada de Morville nació en 1184, en Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Morville, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Helawise de Stuteville, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland en 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 8 de enero de 1240 hasta 7 de enero de 1241, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
